CenterConfig.title: Center Configuration
CenterConfig.description: System branding, localization, currency and WhatsApp automation settings.

whatsappApiUrl.description: Gateway base URL for sending messages

welcomeTemplate.description: Template text for new student registrations

attendanceTemplate.description: Template text for real-time arrival scan notifications

Student.title: Student Profile
Student.description: Student registration record including parents' contact and auto-incrementing custom ID.

studentId.description: Custom beautiful sequential ID (e.g. std001, std002)

qrCodeData.description: Unique QR string matching studentId or unique UID

Teacher.title: Teacher Profile
Teacher.description: Instructor registry holding default financial shares and subject mapping.

defaultShare.description: Default share percentage for sessions (e.g. 70 for 70%)

ClassGroup.title: Class/Group Configuration
ClassGroup.description: Rosters and scheduling groups defining teachers, session-pricing, and material configs.

name.description: Group title (e.g., Sunday 5 PM High School 1st)

pricePerSession.description: Fees paid by student for each session attendance

bookletPrice.description: Price charged to student for booklets/lesson notes

bookletCost.description: Base print/wholesale cost of the booklet to calculate net margins

bookletStock.description: Remaining quantity of materials in local stock

schedule.description: Formatted days and hours of meetings

AttendanceLog.title: Attendance & Billing Log
AttendanceLog.description: Daily real-time logs processing scanned QR inputs, instant cashier/material distribution and Parent notification payloads.

sessionId.description: Associated active dynamic session log PK

isPaid.description: Whether session price is paid on site

paymentAmount.description: Session cash collected directly from student

bookletReceived.description: Whether student received the session booklet

bookletPaid.description: Whether booklet fee is settled in cash session

FinancialSession.title: Active Financial Session
FinancialSession.description: Financial ledger document generated per group meeting logging revenue and teacher shares.

totalSessionRevenue.description: Sum of attendance fees collected or expected

totalBookletsSold.description: Count of booklets distributed to students

teacherEarnings.description: Calculated earnings share of the teacher

centerEarnings.description: Calculated earnings share of the center

closedAt.description: Time when session billing is frozen

CenterExpense.title: Expense Voucher
CenterExpense.description: General center operations expenses (Rent, Water, Power, Assistant Hourly salaries).

category.description: Voucher type: Rent, Utilities, Salaries, Marketing, Others

amount.description: Subtracted cash value from center drawer

UserProfile.title: User Profile (RBAC)
UserProfile.description: System operators (Admins, Teachers, Assistants/Scanners) with strict authorization levels.

teacherId.description: ID of mapped Teacher record (if role is teacher)

/centers_config/{configId}.description: Singleton configuration path for localized variables and gateway APIs.

/user_profiles/{uid}.description: Access control profile mapping with strict role boundaries.

/students/{studentDocId}.description: Independent master collection cataloging registered students across groups.

/classes_groups/{groupId}.description: Core active target groupings matching teachers and schedule rules.

/attendance_logs/{logId}.description: Flat daily log records querying individual attendance states.

/financial_sessions/{sessionId}.description: Live sessions for tracking cash boxes and splits.
